info.name: NodeProject - HR API Scenario Test Suite
info.description:
One request per scenario (success + expected failure) so you can trigger any single case and immediately see whether the response matches what the code should do.

IMPORTANT — requires validateSchema.js fix: the original validateSchema(schema, source) middleware ignored the 'source' argument and always validated req.body, which made every route using "params"/"query" (get/delete employee, search, get/delete department, cancel leave, get leave balance) always return 400 regardless of input. Apply the corrected validateSchema.js (validates req[source]) before running this collection, or the 'success' cases for those routes will fail.

SETUP: run '0. Setup' folder first (Login as Employee / Admin / Manager). Fill in adminEmail/adminPassword and managerEmail/managerPassword collection variables with real seeded accounts first — register only creates Employee-role accounts.

Run folders top-to-bottom within themselves; later requests in a folder often depend on variables set by earlier ones (e.g. departmentId, leaveId).

request.description: Run 'Register - Success' first if this account doesn't exist yet.
Run 'Register - Success' first so this email already exists.
phone must match /^[6-9][0-9]{9}$/
password must be >= 8 chars

exec: pm.test("Error message mentions 'invalid email or password'", function () {
pm.test("Error message mentions 'invalid email or password'", function () {

request.description: Run 'Add Employee - Success' first.
Uses employeeToken instead of adminToken.

item.name: Add Employees - Bulk via JSON File (201)

formdata.description: Attach a .json file: an array of { name, email, password, phone? }

request.description: Schema requires employeeId + at least one other field (.min(2)).

Requires the validateSchema.js fix (query source).
Schema requires at least one search param (.min(1)).
Fill in roleId collection variable with a real Role _id first.

Requires the validateSchema.js fix (params source).

item.name: Get Department By Id - Not Found (404)

request.description: Note: updateDepartmentSchema uses 'name' while createDepartmentSchema uses 'departmentName' — inconsistent field naming in the original code, not a typo here.
dept_service.js reads employeeId/newDepartmentId from the body, not the URL params.
Requires the validateSchema.js fix (params source).
Run last — deletes the department created above.

item.name: Apply Leave - End Date Before Start Date (400)

request.description: Run 'Apply Leave - Success' first so there's a Pending leave to overlap with.
Run 'Approve Leave - Success' first so this leave is no longer Pending.
Requires the validateSchema.js fix (params source).

item.name: Get Leave Balance - THE ACTUAL CHECK (decreased after approval)

request.description: Run after 'Approve Leave - Success' on a leave applied AFTER 'Get Leave Balance - Before' ran, so the delta reflects that one leave.

exec: console.log("Balance before:", before, "| Balance after:", after);

request.description: Requires the validateSchema.js fix (params source). Uses adminToken, which is not the leave's owner.
